global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text elements promoting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting a free trial for PulsePlay with an exclusive offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A vibrant solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The text 'PulsePlay' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top of the ad, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: The phrase 'Exclusive tonight' is written in a clean, white font, positioned below the headline, emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Cancellation note
elements.description: The text 'Cancel anytime' appears in a smaller white font beneath the exclusive offer, providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: The button 'Try for free' is displayed in a bold, white font at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue are scattered across the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape in a lighter blue tone, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Medium decorative shape
elements.description: An oval shape in a lighter blue color, positioned centrally, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A small circular shape in a lighter blue tone, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Medium rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter blue color, positioned centrally, adding to the design.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight' is prominently displayed in a clean, white font, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Cancellation policy
elements.description: The text 'Cancel anytime' is in a smaller white font, providing reassurance to potential users.

elements.label: Free trial button
elements.description: The button 'Try for free' is displayed in a bold, white font at the bottom, encouraging user action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, PulsePlay, exclusive offer, free trial
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
